title: Allow a span of Dates to be entered in the Date column
excerpt: Hi, our Monday calendar has a section for users to enter their “Not Available” dates. The date column currently only allows a single date. Can you add the ability to enter a span of dates? If a user is on vacation for 2 …

posts.author: jimkeaney (Jim Keaney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, our Monday calendar has a section for users to enter their “Not Available” dates. The date column currently only allows a single date. Can you add the ability to enter a span of dates? If a user is on vacation for 2 weeks, it’d be easier for them not to have to make 10 separate entries. Thanks!

posts.author: cherylbenke (Cheryl Benkert)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m experimenting with 2 date columns. One for first day they’ll be gone and one for the day they return.
I’m also experimenting with the Timeline column which allows for a date range.
